zh.Chalon-sur-Saone, Saone-et-Loire, Bourgo: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o
zh.Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgo: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o
zh.lifeSummary: 當Élisabeth de Bourgogne於大約1240年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o時，她的父親Hughes de Chalons21歲，母親Adelaide de Bourgogne I21歲。她於1254年1月27日與Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1275年7月9日享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Élisabeth de Bourgogne于大约1240年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o时，她的父亲Hughes de Chalons21岁，母亲Adelaide de Bourgogne I21岁。她于1254年1月27日与Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1275年7月9日享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Élisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Élisabeth de Bourgogne was born about 1240, in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Hughes de Chalons, was 21 and her mother, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, was 21. She married Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg on 27 January 1254. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 9 July 1275, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Élisabeth de Bourgogne est née environ 1240, à Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hughes de Chalons, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg le 27 janvier 1254. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 juillet 1275, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Élisabeth de Bourgogne um 1240 in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hughes de Chalons 21 und ihre Mutter Adelaide de Bourgogne I 21. Sie hat am 27. Januar 1254 Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Juli 1275 im Alter von 36 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Élisabeth de Bourgogne è nata il circa 1240 nel Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Hughes de Chalons, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg il 27 gennaio 1254. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 9 luglio 1275, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Élisabeth de Bourgogneが約1240年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャロン-スル-サoンで生まれた時，父Hughes de Chalonsは21歳，母Adelaide de Bourgogne Iは21歳であった。1254年1月27日にGraf Hartmann V von Kyburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1275年7月9日に36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Élisabeth de Bourgogne(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 차론-수-사o니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hughes de Chalons(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide de Bourgogne I(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1254년 1월 27일 Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 7월 9일 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Élisabeth de Bourgogne nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hughes de Chalons, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg em 27 de janeiro de 1254. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de julho de 1275, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Élisabeth de Bourgogne родилась около 1240 г. в местности халон-сур-саoн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Hughes de Chalons было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Bourgogne I, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg 27 января 1254 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 июля 1275 г. в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Élisabeth de Bourgogne nació aproximadamente 1240, en Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hughes de Chalons, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg el 27 de enero de 1254. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 9 de julio de 1275, a la edad de 36 años.
